title: Day 21: Day 21 — Employer Branding
content:
# Day 21 — Employer Branding

## Topic
Making your brokerage attractive before the first conversation

## 3–5 Key Points
- **Your brand recruits before you do:** Candidates form opinions from your website, social presence, and reputation long before a call happens.
- **A strong careers page matters:** It should clearly explain your value proposition, culture, and what kind of agent thrives with you.
- **Video builds trust fast:** Recruiting videos let prospects see your people, energy, and environment instead of guessing.
- **Testimonials do heavy lifting:** Stories from successful agents are more credible than polished claims from leadership.
- **Consistency beats hype:** A believable, repeatable brand message is more effective than flashy recruiting promises.

## Why It Matters
Employer branding lowers friction in recruiting. When prospects already believe your brokerage is credible, supportive, and aligned with their goals, outreach converts more easily and the whole pipeline gets stronger.
